SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---GUAN VILLAMAR-SON. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FUNG, FLORENCE TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT VILLAMAR, JOAQUIN JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF FLORENCE FUNG AND AGAINST JOAQUIN VILLAMAR, TOTAL JUDGMENT $0.00; CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF FLORENCE FUNG AND AGAINST JOAQUIN VILLAMAR IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,565 PRINCIPAL PLUS $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL CROSS CLAIMS JUDGMENT IS $5655.00. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-04-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FUNG, FLORENCE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT VILLAMAR, JOAQUIN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
